name: setDropdownValidation
description: Adds or removes a dropdown list on a range of cells. Provide values to create a dropdown restricting input to those options. Omit values to remove dropdown validation from the range.

spreadsheetId.description: The spreadsheet ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Sheets URL.

range.description: A1 notation range to apply the dropdown to (e.g., "Sheet1!B2:B100" or "C2:C50").

values.description: The allowed dropdown options (e.g., ["Open", "In Progress", "Done"]). Omit to remove existing dropdown validation from the range.

strict.description: If true, reject input that does not match one of the dropdown values.

inputMessage.description: Help text shown when a cell with the dropdown is selected.
